caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering sits at a desk in a studio setting. He is wearing a gold watch and a necklace. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD." To his left, a white banner features gold stars and the repeated phrase "UNIQUE HUSTLE." Behind him, a blue sign on the wall reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in conversation, speaking and gesturing with his right hand. He starts by looking slightly to the side, then raises his hand to emphasize a point, and finally settles his hands on the desk while continuing to talk. A small circular logo is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
